title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.450 - Payments to contractor, when made
text:
49.450.  Payments to contractor, when made. — When any installment shall become due to the undertaker, according to contract, the county commission shall make an order that the same be paid out of the county treasury.
(RSMo 1939 § 13727, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12068; 1919 § 9468; 1909 § 3689 
Effective 1-01-85
